3060740.name: Steel Century Groove: Midnight - Supporter Pack
3060740.description:
Thank You!

If you’re enjoying Steel Century Groove: Midnight, this pack is an optional way of supporting the continued development of Steel Century Groove. The game is mostly the work of one person, so your contribution can make a huge difference in improving the game. 

As an extra thank you, this pack includes access to the Dualdrive-E4 Tenzerk in Steel Century Groove: Midnight. This Tenzerk will be available to all players at no extra cost in the full version of Steel Century Groove, and there are no plans to make any Tenzerks exclusive to DLC.

About the Dualdrive-E4:

This advanced Tenzerk incorporates a deck-building mechanic. On each stem, draw two Instruction Disks from your deck. You can freely swap between the effects of the two Instruction Disks by using one of your moves. 

With your cooldowns, you can fabricate new higher level Instruction Disks or destroy the ones you no longer need. As the battle goes on, your Instruction Disks will become more powerful, so while the Dualdrive may start out weak, it gains strength the longer you can stay in the fight.

This pack also includes 5 mods for the Dualdrive-E4. All content will be available on all of your saves after they complete the first tutorial battle in Steel Century Groove: Midnight.

英语*
